description: A list of live stream resources matching the request criteria.
name: LiveStreamListResponse

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#liveStreamListResponse.

nextPageToken.description: The token for the next page of results.

prevPageToken.description: The token for the previous page of results.

pageInfo.description: Paging details for a list of live streaming resources.

totalResults.description: The total number of results in the result set.

resultsPerPage.description: The number of results included in the API response.

items.description: A list of live streams that match the request criteria.
A liveStream resource contains information about the video stream that you are transmitting to YouTube. The stream provides the content that will be broadcast to YouTube users.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#liveStream.

id.description: The ID that YouTube assigns to uniquely identify the stream.

snippet.description: Basic details about a live stream including its title, description, and channel association.

channelId.description: The ID of the channel to which this stream is affiliated.

title.description: The stream's title. The value must be between 1 and 128 characters long.

description.description: The stream's description. The value cannot be longer than 10000 characters.

publishedAt.description: The date and time that the stream was created.

isDefaultStream.description: Indicates whether this stream is the default stream.

cdn.description: The cdn object defines the live stream's content delivery network (CDN) settings.

ingestionType.description: The method or protocol used to transmit the video stream.

ingestionInfo.description: The ingestionInfo object contains information that YouTube provides that you need to transmit your RTMP or HTTP stream to YouTube.

streamName.description: The stream name that YouTube assigns to the video stream.

ingestionAddress.description: The primary ingestion URL that you should use to stream video to YouTube.

backupIngestionAddress.description: The backup ingestion URL that you should use to stream video to YouTube.

rtmpsIngestionAddress.description: The primary secured ingestion URL that you should use to stream video to YouTube.

backupRtmpsIngestionAddress.description: The backup secured ingestion URL that you should use to stream video to YouTube.

resolution.description: The resolution of the inbound video data.

frameRate.description: The frame rate of the inbound video data.

status.description: Status information about a live stream including its stream status and health status.

healthStatus.description: The health status of the stream.

status.description: The status code of this stream.

lastUpdateTimeSeconds.description: The last time this status was updated, as a Unix timestamp.

configurationIssues.description: The configurations issues on this stream.

contentDetails.description: Detailed settings for a live stream including the stream key and ingestion settings.

boundBroadcastId.description: The ID of the live broadcast to which this stream is bound.

isReusable.description: Indicates whether the stream is reusable, which means that it can be bound to multiple broadcasts.
